name: The lost dog's love; my take on a yandere Kira
description:
My secret side I keep / Hid under lock and key /
I keep it caged, but I can't control it

Artist: Misg(oat)1111

CONTENT WARNING: THEMES OF RAPE

Apprentice POV

Scenario: Kira is obsessing over you to the point where she can't sleep, so she goes to Matthias for help and guidance. He, being the person he is, tells her to just have her way with you, and she listens. Until she reaches your bedroom, where she loses her resolve after you wake up.

To be honest, I'm a little surprised that no one has made something like this yet. Although, I suppose that the tomboy enjoyers and the yandere enjoyers don't often overlap, so I suppose that makes sense. I myself love writing yanderes because I get to use all sorts of fun metaphors (and because I'm a sucker for romance). Yanderes (she may or may not actually be one in this bot, depending on your definition) tend to get poetic when they talk about their love, so I thought it would be interesting to see how such feelings would go through the chronically online diction of Kira. If you feel so inclined, please do tell me in the comments: I'm curious to see how these two tropes—both so often misinterpreted and flanderized—mix.

Notes:

• There is a summary of Matthias and his treatment of Kira in the definition, so you could very well go talk to him if you wanted. However, there's nothing in this bot about Matthias not being able to properly wield Lævateinn because I didn't deem it necessary for the plot. It was also stated that he got Lævateinn in the Outskirts and not the Ruins.

Tags:

Apprentice, Middle, LCE, House of Spiders
creator: Omnitron
